zh.lifeSummary: 當Gerald FitzGerald於1487年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達梅諾斯時，他的父親Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare32歲，母親Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare30歲。他於1503年與Elizabeth Zouche在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達吉爾達 安德 拉森加結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1533年被列為deputy to the king's lieutenant of ireland。他去世於1542年12月13日在英國倫敦享年55歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭米德萊可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gerald FitzGerald于1487年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達梅諾斯时，他的父亲Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare32岁，母亲Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare30岁。他于1503年与Elizabeth Zouche在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達吉爾達 安德 拉森加结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1533年被列为deputy to the king's lieutenant of ireland。他去世于1542年12月13日在英国倫敦享年55岁，埋葬在英国英格兰米德萊可。

nameMeanings.name: FitzGerald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Liam, Aidan, Bridgid, Caitlin, Donal, Fitz, Fitzgerald, Ciaran, Colum, Dermot.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Gerald (see Gerald ), ‘son of Gerald’. This is a very common Anglo-Norman name in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Gearailt. Irish bearers of the name claim descent from Gerald Fitzwalter de Windsor, constable of Pembroke Castle in the early 12th century, whose grandson Raymond (or Redmond) ‘le Gros’ FitzGerald (died after 1185) led the invasion of Ireland on behalf of Strongbow in 1170. A branch of the family held the title Knight of Glin from at least 1299–2011.

variants.name: Jarrell
meanings: English (Kent and Middlesex; of Norman origin): variant of Jarrold, itself a variant of Gerald .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Gerald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + wald ‘rule’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. There has been some confusion with Gerard . It died out in England at the end of the 13th century. However, it continued to be popular in Ireland, where it had been brought in the 12th century at the time of Strongbow's invasion. It was used in England in the 17th century and revived in the 19th century, along with several other long-extinct names of Norman, Old English, and Celtic origin, and is now more common than Gerard, which survived all along as an English ‘gentry’ name.

variants.name: Jerrold
meanings: Rare variant of   Gerald  , probably a transferred use of the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Gerald FitzGerald was born in 1487, in Maynooth, County Kildare, Ireland, his father, Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare, was 32 and his mother, Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare, was 30. He married Elizabeth Zouche in 1503, in Kildare and Rathangan, County Kildare, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. In 1533, at the age of 46, his occupation is listed as deputy to the king's lieutenant of ireland. He died on 13 December 1542, in London, England, at the age of 55, and was buried in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Kildare and Rathangan, County Kildare, I: Kildare and Rathangan, County Kildare, Irlande
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gerald FitzGerald est né en 1487, à Maynooth, County Kildare, Irlande, son père, Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Zouche en 1503, à Kildare and Rathangan, County Kildare, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. En 1533, à l’âge de 46 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est deputy to the king's lieutenant of ireland. Il est décédé le 13 décembre 1542, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gerald FitzGerald 1487 in Maynooth, County Kildare, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare 32 und seine Mutter Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare 30. Er hat 1503 in Kildare and Rathangan, County Kildare, Irland Elizabeth Zouche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1533, als er 46 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als deputy to the king's lieutenant of ireland aufgeführt. Er starb am 13. Dezember 1542 im Alter von 55 Jahren in London, England und wurde in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gerald FitzGerald è nato il nel 1487 nel Maynooth, County Kildare, Irlanda, il suo padre, Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Zouche nel 1503, nel Kildare and Rathangan, County Kildare, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1533, all'età di 46 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come deputy to the king's lieutenant of ireland. Morì il 13 dicembre 1542, nel London, England, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Gerald FitzGeraldが1487年にアイルランドコウントイ キルダアメイノオスで生まれた時，父Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildareは32歳，母Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildareは30歳であった。1503年にアイルランドコウントイ キルダアキルダア アンド ラサンガンでElizabeth Zoucheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1533年，46歳の時，職業はdeputy to the king's lieutenant of irelandと記録されている。彼は1542年12月13日にイギリスロンドンで55歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスミッドレセックスにて埋葬された。

ko.Kildare and Rathangan, County Kildare, I: 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르 킬더르 앤드 래스아그가
ko.lifeSummary: Gerald FitzGerald(이)가 1487년 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르 메이노스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1503년 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르 킬더르 앤드 래스아그가에서 Elizabeth Zouche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1533년, 46세의 나이로 그의 직업은 deputy to the king's lieutenant of ireland이었다. 그는 1542년 12월 13일 영국 런던에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gerald FitzGerald nasceu em 1487, em Maynooth, County Kildare, Irlanda, seu pai, Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Zouche em 1503, em Kildare and Rathangan, County Kildare, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1533, com 46 anos, sua profissão aparece como deputy to the king's lieutenant of ireland. Ele faleceu em 13 de dezembro de 1542, em London, Inglaterra, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Kildare and Rathangan, County Kildare, I: каилдар анд ратанган, коунти каилдар, Ирландия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gerald FitzGerald родился в 1487 г. в местности меинут, коунти каилдар, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Zouche в 1503 г. в местности каилдар анд ратанган, коунти каилдар, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. В 1533 году, в возрасте 46 лет,  он работал по профессии deputy to the king's lieutenant of ireland. Он умер 13 декабря 1542 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gerald FitzGerald nació en 1487, en Maynooth, County Kildare, Irlanda, su papá, Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald, 8th Earl of Kildare, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Alison FitzGerald or Eustace Countess of Kildare, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Zouche en 1503, en Kildare and Rathangan, County Kildare, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1533, a la edad de 46 años, su ocupación registrada era deputy to the king's lieutenant of ireland. Murió el 13 de diciembre de 1542, en London, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
